title: Date de réception français de l'instrument maltais

pages.text:
F8+68

AMBASSADE DE FRANCE

Keeu au B. O le 7 -30 JUN 1998

Lassment 1

FR 10

N.V. 186198

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs and the Environment presents its compliments to the

Embassy of France and with reference to the Embassy's Note No. 94/AE dated 16 June 1998, has the honour to enclose herewith the Instrument of Ratification of the Agreement on Co-operation in Matters regarding Internal Affairs between the Government of the

Republic of Malta and the Government of the Republic of France signed in Paris on 9*

March 1998.

The Ministry requests the intervention of the Embassy of France in forwarding the

Instrument of Ratification to its highest destination.

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs and the Environment avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the Embassy of France the assurances of its highest consideration.

as June 1998

ENTINO

Embassy of France

Ta' Xbiex
